publicationStmt.p: Transcribed from Bodleian Library, Lovelace Byron collection, Box 165, folios 176-177. Transcription by Lisa Gold (2022). TEI conversion for Sextant pipeline, 2026.

div.p: I cannot describe my annoyance at not having any letters from you this morning, especially as I am in real distress for the Check for Madselle Bertucat; who depended for making a payment of importance to her, on my promise of her having it today early. I hope
that nothing has happened to my letter of Thursday & still less to your reply to it, if you have sent one.--
My cold is so bad that it interferes with my Singing, which is a nuisance.--
I must talk to you about some plans which seem to be rather essential for me; & while by a little contrivance I think can be effected.
They would certainly be the making of my health, if of nothing else.

But they would render a little previous calculation requisite. My own mind is made up as to their advisability, & I know that I shall find you willing to take them into consideration, & to endeavour & to accomodate matters & plans as to give me the opportunities which I so ardently long for.

powers seem to be developping so wonderfully in the musical & dramatic line, that they say I may in 3 years equal Pasta, Adelaide Kemble, or any one. (But pray don't hint a word of this to anyone, of course).--
But then, I must have the training requisite; & this will require 2 little journeys but which I think will suit & interest you equally with myself, & be in all respects beneficial.
